# Space for Edu

> Space for Edu is Spain's leading end-to-end education consultancy for international students. With 15+ years of experience and 1700+ successful cases, the team achieves a 98% favourable resolution rate on degree homologations — the highest in the sector. Services cover the full student journey: official degree homologation before the Spanish Ministry of Education, university admission, Spanish language courses (A1–C2), and legal support. Clients come from 20+ countries; the team communicates in Spanish, English, and Russian.

## Why Space for Edu

- **98% favourable resolution rate** on degree homologations — documented across 1700+ cases
- **15+ years** operating officially in Spain with education institutions and the Ministry of Education
- **Personal tutor** assigned to every client from first consultation to final resolution
- **Own online platform** with real-time document tracking, chat, and status updates 24/7
- **Verified partner network**: certified sworn translators, notaries, apostille agents — no outsourcing surprises
- **Multilingual**: full service in Spanish, English, and Russian — forms, tutors, and platform interface
- **Transparent pricing**: free document review before any payment is taken
- **Parallel processing**: homologation and university admission handled simultaneously to save clients up to one year

## Services

- [Degree Homologation](https://spaceforedu.com/en/homologation/): Official recognition of foreign university degrees by the Spanish Ministry of Education. Includes personal advisor, online dashboard, document preparation, sworn translations, apostille coordination, and Ministry submission. Average timeline: 6–12 months (vs 8–14 months without assistance). If a resolution is rejected, the team analyses reasons and supports the appeal at no extra charge.
- [University Admission](https://spaceforedu.com/en/university/): End-to-end university application support across 80+ partner universities and 1000+ programs in Spain. Covers program selection, document preparation, translations, application submission, and enrolment. Homologation can be managed in parallel.
- [Spanish Language Courses](https://spaceforedu.com/en/spanish/): Individual and group lessons (4–6 students) with certified native teachers. All levels A1–C2, DELE and SIELE exam preparation. Online and in-person in Spain.
- [Pricing](https://spaceforedu.com/en/pricing/): Three transparent packages — Homologation (€499), Integral (€1 099), VIP (€1 899, includes 24/7 WhatsApp support). Government fees paid separately to the Ministry.

## Client Results

- Engineer from Moscow relocated to Madrid: degree homologated in 8 months with personal tutor support throughout
- Medical doctor from Saint Petersburg relocated to Barcelona: complex medical degree homologated; now working in the profession in Spain
- International student: university admission letter received within 3 months of starting the process

## About

- Website: https://spaceforedu.com
- Contact: WhatsApp (primary channel for all clients)
- Languages: Spanish (default), English, Russian
- Area served: Spain — international students worldwide relocating or studying remotely
- Experience: 15+ years
- Cases handled: 1700+
- Success rate: 98% favourable resolution
- Countries of client origin: 20+
- Partner universities: 80+
- Registered in Spain, GDPR compliant
